name: ulvior-tests
description: BDD tests for Ulvior platform — Cucumber + Selenium + Gherkin

scripts.test:all: npm run clean && npm run test:bdd
scripts.test:flow:admin: npm run clean:admin && cucumber-js features/api/AdminBackendE2E.feature features/ui/AdminAuthenticatedFlow.feature features/ui/AdminControlledActions.feature --format json:reports/json/final-admin-flow.json
scripts.test:flow:empresa: npm run clean:empresa && cucumber-js features/api/CompanyBackendE2E.feature features/ui/CompanyAuthenticatedFlow.feature features/ui/CompanyControlledActions.feature --format json:reports/json/final-empresa-flow.json
scripts.test:flow:full: npm run clean && cucumber-js features/api/AdminBackendE2E.feature features/ui/AdminAuthenticatedFlow.feature features/ui/AdminControlledActions.feature features/api/CandidateBackendE2E.feature features/ui/CandidateAuthenticatedFlow.feature features/ui/CandidateControlledActions.feature features/api/CompanyBackendE2E.feature features/ui/CompanyAuthenticatedFlow.feature features/ui/CompanyControlledActions.feature --format json:reports/json/final-full-flow.json
